@graph.name: AI Engagement Models - Service Tiers | AIIA Co
@graph.description: Three engagement models for AI integration: a focused starter implementation, a full deployment, and an ongoing partnership. Choose the model that matches your current stage.

@graph.name: AIIA Engagement Models
@graph.description: Structured service tiers for AI integration - from initial implementation to long-term AI partnership.

itemListElement.name: Starter Implementation
itemListElement.description: A focused, scoped AI integration targeting one high-impact process. Ideal for organizations beginning their AI journey or validating AI ROI before broader rollout.

itemListElement.name: Full Deployment
itemListElement.description: End-to-end AI implementation across multiple business functions. Includes discovery, integration, workflow automation, and team enablement - delivered as a complete transformation engagement.

itemListElement.name: Ongoing AI Partnership
itemListElement.description: A retained engagement for organizations that want continuous AI expansion - new use cases, system optimization, and strategic AI leadership as the technology and business evolve.
